# translate(_:)

**Instance Method**

Presents a translation of the selected text.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func translate(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object calling this method.

## Overview

To present the standard operating system UI for translating text, call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInteraction/translate(text:from:)] in your implementation of this method.

## Translating and transliterating text

- **transliterateChinese(_:)**: Converts the selected text between traditional and simplified Chinese.

items.description: Converts the selected text between traditional and simplified Chinese.
